prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科（历史类）最低位次分别为约301→591→316→494→634名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大），2025年基准约634名，较2021年累计后移约333名；该校在黑龙江省文科（历史类）招生计划：2021年27人、2022年28人、2023年28人、2024年31人、2025年36人，逐年递增；2026年计划38人，较2025年再增2人（扩招约5.6%），扩招有利于降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第56名，属全国政法类院校最高学府，法学领域权威地位稳固；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（2016年校园安全旧事），但事件年代久远影响有限；抖音热度排名总榜第6（高热），综合热度约975万，短视频平台曝光度极高，对报考关注有升温作用。2024年声誉文件显示该校在内蒙古理科出现投档线暴跌，但黑龙江文科未受波及；法学为A+学科（全国唯一法学A+），第五轮学科评估中法学稳居全国第一，对文科考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度持续偏热，法检系统、律师行业就业前景稳定；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约16.7万，按近年历史类占比约31.8%估算，历史类考生约5.3万人，较2025年5.47万人略减约3%，考生规模小幅收缩，竞争略有缓和。；中国政法大学位于北京，对黑龙江省考生具有较强跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江招生计划逐年增加，2026年文科组计划38人，为近年最高，体现对黑龙江生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上行趋势、2026年扩招约5.6%及历史类考生总数略降，竞争压力有所缓解，但抖音高热曝光和法学A+王牌专业的持续吸引力对位次形成支撑。在2025年基准634名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约665名，区间545–785名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 301 → 591 → 316 → 494 → 634, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing). The 2025 baseline is about 634, a cumulative increase of about 333 positions compared to 2021. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province: 27 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 36 in 2025, increasing year by year. The 2026 plan is 38, an increase of 2 from 2025 (expansion of about 5.6%), which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Political Science and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is the highest institution among national political and legal universities, with a solid authoritative position in the field of law. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to a 2016 campus safety incident), but the event is old and has limited impact. Douyin heat ranking: 6th overall (high heat), with comprehensive heat of about 9.75 million. The short video platform exposure is extremely high, which may increase attention to applications. The 2024 reputation document shows that the university experienced a sharp drop in the admission cutoff line for science in Inner Mongolia, but the liberal arts in Heilongjiang were not affected. Law is an A+ discipline (the only A+ in law nationwide), and in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law firmly ranks first in the country, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the law major continues to be high, with stable employment prospects in the court, procuratorate, and lawyer industries. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 31.8%, the number of history category candidates is about 53,000, a slight decrease of about 3% from 54,700 in 2025, indicating a slight contraction in the candidate pool and a slight easing of competition. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for candidates from Heilongjiang Province. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang has increased year by year, with the 2026 liberal arts group plan of 38 being the highest in recent years, reflecting the importance placed on students from Heilongjiang.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 expansion of about 5.6%, and the slight decrease in the total number of history category candidates, competitive pressure has eased somewhat. However, the high Douyin heat exposure and the continued appeal of the A+ law major support the ranking. Based on the 2025 baseline of 634, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 665, with a range of 545–785.

- Law.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 545–785, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 law majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 545), you can focus on impacting top majors like Law (Legal Talent Training Model Reform Experimental Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 785), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3031 → 3512 → 8185 → 4246 → 5997, with drastic fluctuations: in 2023, it abnormally shifted to 8185 (possibly due to a decrease in the provincial control line that year), in 2024 it significantly moved forward to 4246, and in 2025 it shifted back to 5997. Over the past three years, the fluctuation range is about 4000 places, showing an overall oscillating pattern, with a baseline of about 5997 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for science (physics category) is: 25 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, and the competitive landscape remains essentially unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Political Science and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. Although it is known for law, it also has high appeal to science candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to past events), with limited impact. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 6th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 9.75 million, extremely high short video exposure, which may increase attention for applications. The 2024 reputation file shows that the university experienced a sharp drop in admission scores in Inner Mongolia for science, but no similar anomaly occurred in Heilongjiang for science. Law is an A+ discipline (the only one in the country), and the strength of law at CUPL still strongly attracts science candidates to apply for law-related majors (such as law, law dual degree programs, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the law major continues to be high; majors like financial engineering and economics show differentiated and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000. Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 68.2%, it is estimated that there are about 114,000 physics category candidates, a slight decrease of about 3% from 117,400 in 2025, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale and a slight easing of competition. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Heilongjiang Province. Its enrollment plan for science in Heilongjiang has been stable at 24 for many consecutive years, with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the drastic historical ranking fluctuations, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the slight decrease in the total number of physics category candidates, competitive pressure has slightly eased. However, the high Douyin heat exposure and the sustained appeal of the A+ law major support the ranking. Based on the 2025 baseline of 5997, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 6047, with a range of 5547 to 6547.
